ddls:
CREATE TABLE "billionaires" (
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billionaire */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the billionaire */,
  "net_worth" REAL /* Net worth of the billionaire in billions of USD */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence of the billionaire */,
  "source" TEXT /* Primary source of the billionaire's wealth */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Global ranking of the billionaire based on net worth */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the billionaire */,
  "residence" TEXT /* City and state/country of residence */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Country of citizenship */,
  "status" TEXT /* Marital or relationship status */,
  "children" INTEGER /* Number of children */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background and degrees */,
  "self_made" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the billionaire is self-made */,
  "geometry" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (longitude, latitude) of the residence */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the billionaire */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Detailed marital status */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the spouse */,
  "spouse_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the spouse */,
  "philanthropy" TEXT /* Philanthropic activities */,
  "charities_supported" TEXT /* List of charities supported */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles */,
  "public_interest" TEXT /* Level of public interest or media coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of wealth */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the additional source of wealth */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Short description of the additional source of wealth */,
  "source_value" REAL /* Estimated value of the source */,
  "source_percentage" REAL /* Percentage contribution to total net worth */,
  "source_description_long" TEXT /* Long, detailed description of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_sources_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational record */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "year_graduated" INTEGER /* Year of graduation */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade point average */,
  "honors" TEXT /* Honors or awards received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_education_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_children" (
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "child_name" TEXT /* Full name of the child */,
  "child_age" INTEGER /* Age of the child */,
  "child_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the child */,
  "child_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the child */,
  "child_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the child */,
  "child_marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the child */,
  "child_spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the child's spouse */,
  "child_spouse_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the child's spouse */,
  "child_philanthropy" TEXT /* Philanthropic activities of the child */,
  "child_charities_supported" TEXT /* List of charities supported by the child */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_children_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_spouse" (
  "spouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spouse */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Full name of the spouse */,
  "spouse_age" INTEGER /* Age of the spouse */,
  "spouse_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the spouse */,
  "spouse_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the spouse */,
  "spouse_philanthropy" TEXT /* Philanthropic activities of the spouse */,
  "spouse_charities_supported" TEXT /* List of charities supported by the spouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_spouse_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_child_spouse" (
  "child_spouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each child's spouse */,
  "child_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the child */,
  "child_spouse_name" TEXT /* Full name of the child's spouse */,
  "child_spouse_age" INTEGER /* Age of the child's spouse */,
  "child_spouse_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the child's spouse */,
  "child_spouse_education" TEXT /* Educational background of the child's spouse */,
  "child_spouse_philanthropy" TEXT /* Philanthropic activities of the child's spouse */,
  "child_spouse_charities_supported" TEXT /* List of charities supported by the child's spouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("child_spouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_child_spouse_child_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_id") REFERENCES billionaire_children ("child_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_charities" (
  "charity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charity */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "charity_name" TEXT /* Name of the charity */,
  "charity_description" TEXT /* Description of the charity */,
  "donation_amount" REAL /* Donation amount in millions of USD */,
  "donation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of donations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_charities_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billionaire_social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media account */,
  "billionaire_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the billionaire */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "handle" TEXT /* Handle or username on the platform */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers */,
  "engagement_rate" REAL /* Engagement rate (likes, comments, shares per post) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billionaire_social_media_billionaire_id FOREIGN KEY ("billionaire_id") REFERENCES billionaires ("billionaire_id")
)
